assertions.title: Sequential cleanup leaves no orphans
assertions.testName: agent error/abort hardening (integration) > (6) sequential cleanup (VAL-CROSS-014) > 10 sequential agent calls leave /scoops and orchestrator.getScoops() at baseline after every iteration

steps.action: Inspect the dedicated Vitest case in packages/webapp/tests/scoops/agent-hardening.test.ts (around lines 871-1023)
steps.expected: The file contains an explicit VAL-CROSS-014 test that runs 10 sequential agent calls and checks cleanup after every iteration.
steps.observed: The dedicated test captures the baseline `/scoops` directory and orchestrator registry, loops through 10 agent invocations, asserts per-iteration equality to the baseline, verifies each `agent_seqN` scratch folder and scoop are removed, and rechecks the final baseline after the loop.

steps.action: Run the smallest Vitest selection for the dedicated VAL-CROSS-014 case with verbose reporting
steps.expected: Only the targeted sequential-cleanup test executes and passes, producing evidence that the cleanup invariants hold.
steps.observed: After escaping regex metacharacters in the `-t` pattern, Vitest ran the targeted test successfully: `Test Files 1 passed (1)` and `Tests 1 passed | 9 skipped (10)`.

evidence.assertionOutput: Verbose output includes the exact test name and a green pass line for `10 sequential agent calls leave /scoops and orchestrator.getScoops() at baseline after every iteration`.
evidence.perIterationProof: The verbose log shows `agent_seq0` through `agent_seq9` each being registered and then unregistered, matching the test body's per-iteration `/scoops` and `orchestrator.getScoops()` baseline assertions.
evidence.sourceCoverage: The test body explicitly asserts baseline equality after every iteration and again after the loop, satisfying the contract's required evidence of per-iteration snapshots.

frictions.description: Vitest interprets `-t` as a regex. The unescaped suggested pattern did not match the literal `orchestrator.getScoops()` text, so the first attempt reported all 10 tests as skipped instead of executing the targeted case.
frictions.resolution: Reran the same smallest file selection with the `-t` pattern escaped as `orchestrator\.getScoops\(\)`.

summary: VAL-CROSS-014 passed. The dedicated test in packages/webapp/tests/scoops/agent-hardening.test.ts executed successfully and proved that 10 sequential agent calls leave both `/scoops/` and `orchestrator.getScoops()` at the pre-call baseline after every iteration.
